title: Remove unnecessary blackfriday dependency
body:
The version of blackfriday is causing that we cannot build go-md2man any
more within CRI-O. This commit removes the dependency since is not
needed at all.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
LGTM, very odd that this is still mentioned in `go.mod` :thinking:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Restarted the flaked test. I think that `go mod tidy` isn't yet where it should be as it should take care of that... (FYI @edsantiago)
Go 1.13 seems to have fixes related to such cases.
